DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The City and County of San Francisco's unopposed demurrer to the complaint is sustained with prejudice.

Order signed,

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)
